summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. One PR is a close-superseded candidate against a hydrated merged fix; two PRs should remain open for maintainer review; one contributor PR should remain open/related rather than be closed without a credit-preserving replacement decision; one PR needs maintainer judgment because automated Codex review comments are still unresolved.

actions.reason: Same linked issue and same root fix path are already merged in hydrated #91742; #91770 remains open with review issues and waiting-on-author status.

Related to the session-lock/session-takeover family, but not safe to auto-close because it is a contributor PR with useful narrow code, bot-requested changes, and no explicit credit-preserving supersession decision.

Maintainer judgment is required because automated Codex review comments remain unresolved and the job cannot repair or merge the PR.
